overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character running through a dusty suburban outskirts area of Night City. The character passes pedestrians, crosses an intersection, and runs past a burning building with bodies on the ground, highlighting the game's dystopian atmosphere with distant megatowers visible through the haze.

agents.ego_description: running along the sidewalk past pedestrians and green dumpsters, heading toward the distant city towers

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green top walking ahead on the sidewalk
two pedestrians standing and conversing on the sidewalk ahead

entered.detail: large green industrial dumpsters lined along the right side of the sidewalk
wooden utility poles with multiple crossbars and wires running along the street

futuristic skyscrapers and industrial towers visible through the hazy atmosphere
palm trees lining the left side of the street
low-rise industrial buildings with corrugated metal roofs on the right side

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a dusty suburban sidewalk lined with green dumpsters and industrial buildings. Palm trees and utility poles line the street while distant megatowers loom through the haze. A few pedestrians are visible ahead, including one in a green top walking in the same direction.

events.description: character approaches and begins crossing the intersection at the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection and crossing the street toward the Almunecar sign

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow jacket walking on the opposite sidewalk

entered.detail: red street sign with white text reading 'Almunecar' mounted on a pole
traffic signal pole with lights at the intersection
white painted stripes marking the pedestrian crosswalk

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a road intersection marked by an 'Almunecar' street sign and traffic lights. The scene opens into a wider area as the character crosses the street, with distant megatowers still visible through the haze. A pedestrian in a yellow jacket walks on the far side.

scene_state.functional_zone: open suburban road with passing traffic

events.description: character sprints across the crosswalk and continues running along the road

agents.ego_description: sprinting along the road past the intersection, with vehicles passing by on the left

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving past on the road

entered.detail: single-story suburban houses with red roofs and porches
metal railings and concrete barriers along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: After crossing the intersection, the character runs along the open road where vehicles pass by on the left. Residential houses with red roofs line the right side, and the area becomes less industrial with more suburban architecture visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: street with burning building and casualties

events.description: burning building with bodies on the ground comes into view indicating recent violence
camera pans past the burning wreckage revealing more destruction and a food truck ahead

agents.ego_description: running past the scene of destruction with burning buildings and bodies, continuing down the street

entered.detail: house engulfed in flames with thick smoke rising from the structure
multiple bodies lying on the sidewalk and ground near the burning building
green and red food truck with 'BURRITO XXL' signage parked on the side
large yellow construction crane visible behind buildings

segments.scene_description: The character runs past a scene of recent violence where a building burns intensely with bodies scattered on the ground. The camera pans to reveal more destruction before passing a green 'BURRITO XXL' food truck. Construction equipment and additional suburban buildings line the road ahead as the character continues running through the dusty outskirts.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dusty suburban outskirts area that shifts from an industrial corridor into a scene of violent urban decay. It begins with the character running along a sidewalk lined with green dumpsters and industrial buildings, with distant megatowers looming through the haze. As the character reaches an intersection marked by an Almunecar street sign, the view opens up to a wider road where the industrial landscape gives way to residential houses with red roofs. The scene then transitions into a zone of destruction as the character runs past an intensely burning building and scattered bodies on the ground. Finally, the camera pans across the wreckage to pass a green Burrito XXL food truck and construction equipment, continuing forward through the hazy suburban sprawl.
